title: gnaphalium leontopodioides
intro: Gnaphalium leontopodioides, also known as Elephant's Ear or Mountain Everlasting, is a perennial herb that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in the Mediterranean region, for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Gnaphalium leontopodioides is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk remedies to treat a range of ailments.
